'''F-22-RGKx''', also known simply as '''F-22''', was a [[Gender/Legends|masculine]]<ref name="Star Tours" /> [[F series repair droid]]<ref name="Convenient Daily Departures: The History of Star Tours" /> with [[Color/Legends|green]] [[Photoreceptor/Legends|photoreceptors]] and silver plating, with a gold trim.<ref name="Star Tours" /> By the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[4 ABY/Legends|4.3 ABY]],<ref name="KOTHB">{{Blog|holocron|7|Death Star timeline}}</ref> he was employed by the [[Star Tours/Legends|Star Tours]] travel agency and performed maintenance on the fans in [[Tomorrowland Starport]]'s hangar. F-22 possessed a cantankerous attitude, finding various things to complain about, from the factory he used to work at, to how "kid" droids were like currently, even down to his "mother-in-law."<ref name="Complete Guide to Star Tours">''[[Complete Guide to Star Tours]]''</ref> When he had finished his job for the [[Standard day/Legends|day]], F-22 often went to the [[Alien Quarter Cantina]]. He also enjoyed listening to [[The Rolling Droids]] and drinking [[oil on the rocks]].<ref name="Star Tours" />

==Behind the scenes==
F-22-RGKx was created for [[Tokyo Disneyland]]'s [[Wikipedia:Simulator ride|simulator ride]] [[Wikipedia:Amusement park|theme park]] attraction [[Star Tours (real-world)|''Star Tours'']], which opened on [[July 12]], [[1989]].<ref name="Star Tours" />

==Appearances==
*[[Star Tours (real-world)|''Star Tours'']] {{1st}} {{C|Tokyo only}}
